Registry / Terms / primary indication

primary indication

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01043 · 9 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 8 distinct definitions — harmonise.
